text: Inside this dimly lit, modern space, I’m greeted by silence and geometric shadows. The glass doors and industrial fixtures evoke a sense of restriction—barriers both literal and metaphorical. Moving deeper, I encounter the vibrant wall labeled 'R+D.' The promise of research and innovation hangs in the air, illuminated by screens and colored lights. I feel simultaneously curious and unsettled, as if on the threshold between exclusion and exploration. The environment demands reflection on how we connect with technology and one another.
